personal.name: Atul Pandey
personal.title: Full Stack Developer | ML Enthusiast | Problem Solver
personal.bio: I build scalable web applications and intelligent solutions that solve real-world problems. Passionate about clean code, user experience, and emerging technologies.
personal.summary: I am a dedicated developer focused on full stack development and machine learning systems. I combine front-end precision with robust back-end integrations.

seo.title: Atul Pandey | Full Stack Developer & ML Enthusiast Portfolio
seo.description: Welcome to my portfolio! I am Atul Pandey, a Full Stack Developer and ML Enthusiast building dynamic, intelligent web applications.

experience.description: Collaborating on responsive React dashboard layouts and back-end integration query optimizations. Refactoring API logic and standardizing route handlers to improve application scaling. Assisting team in documenting database models and optimizing MySQL table indices.

education.description: Major in business statistics and financial modeling. Active lead in software technology workshops and developer clubs.

achievements.title: 1st Place - Smart India Hackathon
achievements.description: Won first prize for creating an AI-based inventory tracking dashboard supporting offline data synchronization.

projects.title: EventTix Enterprise
projects.shortDescription: Full-stack event management & ticket booking platform with role-based authentication.
projects.description: A comprehensive booking system that allows clients to look up regional schedules, reserve tickets dynamically, checkout with secure gates, and receive PDF credentials. Administrators get full CRUD options over ticket counts, dates, and locations.

projects.title: AI Chatbot Assistant
projects.shortDescription: AI-powered chatbot using LLMs and RAG for context-aware conversations.
projects.description: An intelligent bot utilizing vector databases and Retrieval-Augmented Generation to answer business inquiries with contextual precision. Connects to document parsers loading local data vaults.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.shortDescription: Personal portfolio website showcasing projects, skills and achievements.
projects.description: A premium, fully dynamic student administration portal and portfolio dashboard showing stats charts, resume downloads, and live inbox message boards.

projects.title: Stock Price Predictor
projects.shortDescription: ML model to predict stock prices using historical data and LSTM networks.
projects.description: A time-series analytics tool pulling historical stock records, running sequence modeling, and rendering trend forecasts in interactive SVG graph displays.

testimonials.name: John Doe
testimonials.review: Atul is an exceptionally focused developer. He built EventTix with precision, standardizing API endpoints, and delivering on-time.
